title: pouteria aubrevillei
intro: Pouteria aubrevillei, also known as Aubreville's pouteria, is a plant species in the family Sapotaceae. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used in West African and Central African folk medicine. The plant has been found to possess antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including wound healing and the treatment of various infections. Herbal preparations of Pouteria aubrevillei include decoctions and infusions used to treat fever, coughs, and respiratory issues.
